import.title: Import material
import.importAddTooltip: Existing material will be supplemented with the content of the Excel spreadsheet.
import.importReplaceTooltip: Existing material will be deleted and replaced with the content of the Excel spreadsheet.
import.importReplaceConfirm: Do you really want to delete all existing material of this department?
import.nameRequired: You must assign the name of the material.

combined.title: Import data
combined.importAddTooltip: Existing data will be supplemented with the content of the Excel spreadsheet.
combined.importReplaceTooltip: All existing data will be deleted and replaced.
combined.importReplaceConfirm: Do you really want to delete all existing data (materials, collections, categories, locations)?
combined.success: Import successful: {{materials}} material(s), {{sammlungen}} collection(s), {{kategorien}} category/ies, {{standorte}} location(s).
combined.nameRequired: You must assign the name column.
combined.materialienRequired: You must assign the materials column.
combined.sheetAssignmentDescription: Assign each worksheet to the corresponding data type.
combined.noAssignment: At least one worksheet must be assigned.
